response.justification: Candidate is a highly experienced senior/staff engineer with 15+ years of experience, which creates a severe seniority mismatch for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role. Java is listed but is not a primary stack (mostly TypeScript, Node.js, DLang). German proficiency is only Basic, falling short of the required strong verbal/written German. Location (Bangalore, India) also conflicts with the travel-within-Germany requirement.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, agile experience
Broad polyglot background including some Java exposure
Active community contributor with workshops and OSS projects
concerns: Massive overqualification for an entry-level junior position
German language skills only Basic, role requires strong German
Java is peripheral; primary stack is TS/Node/DLang, not insurance-domain Java
